ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code review */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the solution or code being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the reviewer conducting the review */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The time when the review started */,
  "stop_time" TEXT /* The time when the review ended */,
  "time_left" INTEGER /* The time left for the review, if applicable */,
  "accept" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the solution was accepted */,
  "review_rating" TEXT /* The reviewer's rating of the code quality */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* The reviewer's comments on the code */,
  "code_quality_score" REAL /* The code quality score based on the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solutions" (
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solution */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the project to which the solution belongs */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the submitter of the solution */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Time of submission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the solution */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the solution */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the solution */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used in the solution */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for the solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solutions_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES submitters ("submitter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solutions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the reviewer belongs */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submitters" (
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submitter */,
  "submitter_name" TEXT /* Name of the submitter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the submitter */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the submitter belongs */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the submitter */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team to which the submitter belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "project_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the project manager belongs */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewer_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the reviewer */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews conducted */,
  "average_time" REAL /* Average time spent on reviews */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate of the reviews */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewer_performance_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the project */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Current milestone of the project */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the current milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress percentage of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_management_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the project */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the integrated tool */,
  "connection_status" TEXT /* Status of the connection to the tool */,
  "last_sync_time" TEXT /* Last synchronization time with the tool */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_integrations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version control record */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the solution */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash for the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the commit */,
  "commit_time" TEXT /* Time of the commit */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch name for the commit */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag name for the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the project */,
  "review_time" REAL /* Average review time for the project */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate of reviews for the project */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "send_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the review */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Time the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the review */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Time the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_attachments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("id")
)
